import axios from "axios";
import type { TrafficInfo, LatLng } from "../types.js";
import { logInfo, logError } from "../logs.js";

const TRAFFIC_URL = process.env.TRAFFIC_URL!;

function parseCoordinate(lat?: number, lng?: number): LatLng | undefined {
  if (typeof lat === "number" && typeof lng === "number") return { lat, lng };
  return undefined;
}

export async function getTrafficForRoadSegment(): Promise<{ data: TrafficInfo[] }> {
  try {
    const resp = await axios.get(TRAFFIC_URL, { timeout: 10000 });
    const rows: any[] = resp.data?.data || [];

    const traffic: TrafficInfo[] = rows.map(r => ({
      id: r.id,
      highway: r.highway,
      place: r.place,
      status: r.status,
      coordinate: parseCoordinate(r.lat, r.lng),
      lastUpdated: r.lastUpdated,
      averageSpeed: r.averageSpeed,
      congestionLevel: r.congestionLevel
    }));

    logInfo("[trafficService] Traffic data fetched", { count: traffic.length });
    return { data: traffic };
  } catch (err: any) {
    logError("[trafficService] Failed to fetch traffic data", { error: err.message });
    return { data: [] };
  }
}
